title: Harness API keys should not be disclosed
description: Harness is a CI/CD and DevOps platform. API keys authenticate requests to manage pipelines, deployments, secrets, and infrastructure. Exposing keys allows unauthorized access to deployment pipelines and production infrastructure.
recommendation: Remove Harness API keys from source code. Store in environment variables or Harness Secrets Manager. Rotate at app.harness.io/ng/account/profile.
impact: Unauthorized pipeline execution, production deployment access, secrets manager exposure, and cloud infrastructure manipulation.

checks.message: Harness Personal Access Token (PAT) detected (pat. prefix). Harness PATs authenticate all platform API requests including triggering and managing CI/CD pipelines, accessing and modifying Harness Secrets Manager, managing cloud infrastructure connectors, creating and running deployments to production environments, and accessing governance policies and audit logs. Exposing this token allows unauthorized control of your entire DevOps platform. Rotate immediately at app.harness.io/ng/account/profile.
Harness API key detected in variable assignment. Harness API keys provide access to CI/CD pipelines and production deployments. Rotate at app.harness.io/ng/account/profile.
Harness account or organization ID detected. While not a secret alone, combined with an API key it fully identifies the target account. Avoid committing account identifiers.
